dialogues: I thought it was one of those...
Why would you throw something wet at me?
Hasn't even opened the tissue box in there.
So the most likely scenario is that Michael matured overnight?
But I figured I'd rather live with ants than with his creepy little disk.
Would you like to have dinner with us tonight
Best game I've ever seen in my life.
The other guys can go die. Baseball!
Right there. Look, follow my finger.
He wakes up early. He goes to bed early.
koreanHints: 1. 왜 젖은 걸 나한테 던지는 거야?
2. 그 사람이 하룻밤 새 성숙해졌다는 게 제일 가능성 높은 시나리오라는 거야?
3. 개미들이랑 사는 게 낫지, 그 섬뜩한 디스크랑 사는 것보단.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- Why would you ~ : 비난이나 불만을 표현할 때 쓰는 의문문. "도대체 왜 ~하는 거야?"라는 따지는 뉘앙스
- mature overnight : 하룻밤 새 성숙해지다. overnight는 "갑자기, 급작스럽게"라는 의미로 자주 사용
- I'd rather A than B : B보다는 A하는 게 낫다. 두 가지를 비교하며 선호를 표현하는 필수 패턴

sessions.episode: How I Met Your Mother - S04E17  The Front Porch
dialogues: besides himself, his mom and his pediatrician.
Hey, guys, you know how in the future we're always saying,
Really? What is your favorite segment?
we talked about our relationship.
So, if it weren't for you, Ted and I might still be dating?
And sometimes, when you're worried you've made all the wrong decisions in life,
"I put together a little surprise for you and Karen upstairs.
Lily came by and explained everything.
and you're not nearly the man you want to be, what does she do then?
who are still looking for someone.
koreanHints: 1. 인생에서 잘못된 선택만 한 것 같아서 걱정될 때가 있잖아
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- you've made all the wrong decisions : 완전히 잘못된 선택들을 해왔다는 표현. all the wrong을 써서 강조하는 원어민다운 표현
- not nearly : 전혀 ~이 아닌, ~에 한참 못 미치는. not even보다 더 자연스럽고 구어적인 표현
- what does she do then : 그럼 그녀는 어떻게 하는가. 가정 상황에서 상대의 반응을 물을 때 쓰는 자연스러운 질문 패턴
- still looking for someone : 아직도 누군가를 찾는 중. 연애나 인생의 파트너를 찾는 상황에서 자주 쓰는 표현

dialogues: And then I figured, well,
I would like to ward off dementia.
get in the way of what could be
your toothbrush into the toilet.
JERRY: Hello, Jenna? Did you dunk the spatula?
You could have introduced me.
I bruised my lip. I was drinking a Cel-Ray,
Well...you know how in planes they got first class?
Or it could be your Walkman there.
Isn't that some kind of safety thing?
koreanHints: 2. 좋은 관계가 될 수 있는 걸 방해하다
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- ward off : 막다, 예방하다, 물리치다의 뉘앙스. prevent보다 적극적으로 나쁜 것을 미리 차단한다는 느낌
- get in the way of : 방해하다, 장애물이 되다. 물리적/추상적 방해 모두 사용 가능한 자연스러운 일상 표현
- you know how : 상대방의 공감을 이끌어내며 예시를 들 때 쓰는 구어체 표현. "있잖아, 그거 알지" 같은 느낌
